display_text: Techies Aghanim's Scepter: Upgrades Minefield Sign to create a temporary minefield when enemies approach, dealing damage whenever they move within its area. This is a powerful anti-movement mechanic, forcing enemies to either avoid the area or take significant damage, making it ideal for high-ground defense or choke point control.
search_text: Techies Aghanim Scepter anti-movement area denial high-ground defense choke point control

display_text: Techies Aghanim's Shard: Allows Reactive Tazer to be cast on allies, dealing damage to enemies when detonated or when they attack the ally. This transforms Techies into a supportive anti-physical damage hero, discouraging focus fire and providing area denial for team fights.
search_text: Techies Aghanim Shard anti-physical damage supportive focus fire deterrence team fight
